text:
Amy , also known as Mrs. Poopybutthole , is the ex-wife of Mr. Poopybutthole and the mother of Poopy Jr.. She appeared at the end of "The Rickchurian Mortydate".

According to the Rick and Morty animated short, "The Poop In My Pants," Mr. Poopybutthole met Mrs.Poopybutthole at Harry Herpson High School, the school that Morty Smith and Summer Smith attend, but possibly in a different dimension as there are different creatures in the background. The two are shown beating up the Galactic Federation bugs (Gromflamites) in graduation robes, and seems to take place in the end of "The Rickshank Rickdemption". Throughout the video, Mr. Poopybutthole and Mrs. Poopybutthole are shown doing things while the different events of Season 3 are happening in the background. She is also shown pregnant, with a photo that very much resembles Beyonce's pregnant photo. Poopy Jr. is also featured throughout.

In the episode "The Rickchurian Mortydate", she is seen feeding baby food to Poopy Jr. at the dinner table while Mr. Poopybutthole speaks to the audience.

In the episode "Rickmurai Jack", Mr. Poopybutthole talks to the audience and reveals that he isolated himself from Amy as he told her everything that he was feeling and stopped. It is implied that Amy left him after some time.

In the episode "Ricktional Mortpoon's Rickmas Mortcation". Mr. Poopybutthole once again talks to the audience and tries to rebound from Amy by working out until he breaks both of his legs while carrying too much weight. He tries to contact Amy on his phone before asking for his trainer, Carl's phone since Amy blocked him.

In the episode "How Poopy Got His Poop Back", Mr. Poopybutthole plans to find Amy and win her back with the help of Hugh Jackman and Rick's friends, but Rick rejects the idea as the two have an argument and Rick leaves. Rick then becomes back to assist Mr. Poopybutthole as they all go to her house where Mr. Poopybutthole discover she is having an affair with a Predator private investigator Gul'Karna he hired to spy on her after getting a restraining order against him. Gul'Karna then starts hunting Mr. Poopybutthole and his friends after the latter breaks into Amy's apartment and kidnaps Poopy Jr.. During their confrontation with Gul'Karna, Mr. Poopybutthole ends the fight after realizing that he is setting a terrible example for his son as he fails to reconcile with Amy. After his situation is resolved, he parts away with Amy, Poopy Jr., and Gul'Karna who are now a family.

In the episode "Fear No Mort", Mr. Poopybutthole uses one of Rick's portal guns to travel to a reality where he is still happily married with Amy, knocking out and replacing the version of him while disposing him and the portal gun back into the portal. After this version of Amy kisses him, she knows that something off about her husband.

In the episode "Hot Rick", Amy, in an unknown lab with a group of scientists, is spying on Mr. Poopybutthole as he believes he is an alternate version of her husband from another dimension impersonating him. Amy and the scientists find out that his molecular structure does not match the structure from their dimension and her hypothesis was right. After the scientists ask Amy what she wants to do for him, Amy angrily glares at Mr. Poopybutthole.

Mrs. Poopybutthole is a maternal, caring woman, generally pleased with her role as a homemaking housewife, as seen by her mildly happy expression, when feeding her baby. She's a quiet and obedient wife and mother, not saying a word of dialogue, for the entire minute and a half of screentime in the Season 3 epilogue. She's calm and patient, maintaining the same happy face, even when Baby Poopybutthole was behaving stubbornly and not eating the food she was feeding him. She understands this is normal childlike behavior, and getting mad or frustrated would not help her with anything. She made the right decision, as Baby Poopybutthole would soon move on to eat the food, which proves her as being wise and competent.

During her youth, Mrs. Poopybutthole was very passionate in her romantic relationship with Mr. Poopybutthole, spending much time on dates with him and enjoying herself. Pictures of them together, had her laughing and smiling. She was in tears of joy, upon being proposed to. She's free enough that she posed for an abstract picture of herself, while pregnant, wherein she wore a bikini and sat in a floral environment. When being carried into their apartment room, she had her usual happily content face on, even when her husband was straining himself, trying to keep lifting her up. Her only falling out with her husband was an unexplored incident, where the toxic versions of themselves got into a fight, which shows us that aside from her positive traits, Mrs. Poopybutthole can be loud and raging. She asserted emotional dominance over her husband, still screaming in rage, while he was in tears.
